mano_cua.result_summary: Coracle是Nostr社交客户端，需要Nostr私钥(nsec)登录才能访问测试所需功能。基于coracle-474的执行经验确认无法完成登录
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Coracle requires Nostr private key (nsec) authentication. Based on coracle-474 execution (48 steps, 15min timeout), confirmed that compose/upload and other authenticated features are inaccessible without login.
